context7.$comment: Up-to-date documentation and code examples via Context7

moai-lsp.$comment: LSP code intelligence via moai binary (goto definition, find references, hover, diagnostics, rename)

supabase.$comment: Supabase management: create/query tables, run SQL, apply migrations. Requires SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN env var (get one at https://supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens).
